description: This file contains Balanda past continuous modal constructions expressing past ability or possibility during an ongoing action. This corresponds to the English meaning 'could be ...-ing'.

rules.core_meaning: Past ability or possibility in an ongoing action

affirmative_form.note: This construction expresses positive modal meaning without negation

question_form.function: Forms yes/no questions expressing past ability or possibility

constraints: dho must immediately precede the ti-verb
ti- must not be removed or replaced
No negation marker (gba) appears in this construction
No word order change occurs in questions
This construction must not be used for factual past continuous without modality
The construction expresses modality, not certainty or completed action

balanda: Ne nokanve dho tiyai a Wau
english: I could be going to Wau.

balanda: Ni nokanve dho tidhii agbi tiyi
english: He could be coming to the house.

balanda: Wiki nokanve dho tinono gbi difo
english: The child could be walking in the compound.

balanda: Ni nokanve dho timande gbi njü
english: He could be working in the garden.
I could be knowing the truth.

balanda: Ni nokanve dho tivel e takoni
english: He could be telling a story.
I could be writing a book.
He could be reading a book.
I could be buying a bike.
I could be pushing the fruit.
He could be pulling the drum.
He could be turning the table.

balanda: Ne nokanve dho tikeye ti ndi

english: We could be discussing the story.
He could be hugging the child.
He could be protecting the child.

balanda: Ni nokanve dho tidho gbi tiyi
english: He could be being in the house.
I could be doing the work.

balanda: Ne nokanve dho tiwala gbi Wau
english: I could be living in Wau.
I could be watching the animals.

balanda: Ne nokanve dho tija nza we?
Ne nokanve dho tinzü ngo we?
Ne nokanve dho tiyai a Wau we?
english: Could I be going to Wau?

balanda: Ni nokanve dho tidhii agbi tiyi we?
english: Could he be coming to the house?

balanda: Wiki nokanve dho tinono gbi difo we?
english: Could the child be walking in the compound?

balanda: Ni nokanve dho timande gbi njü we?
english: Could he be working in the garden?

balanda: Ne nokanve dho timerego ŋo we?
Ne nokanve dho tiŋiyi sereso we?
english: Could I be knowing the truth?

balanda: Ne nokanve dho tiwe ndi we?
Ni nokanve dho tivel e takoni we?
english: Could he be telling a story?

balanda: Ne nokanve dho tibaha ŋo we?
Ne nokanve dho tisudi kitab we?
english: Could I be writing a book?

balanda: Ni nokanve dho tidheke kitab we?
english: Could he be reading a book?

balanda: Ne nokanve dho tisïhï kese we?
english: Could I be buying a bike?

balanda: Ni nokanve dho tisadi nza we?
Ne nokanve dho tituru linguu we?
english: Could I be pushing the fruit?

balanda: Ni nokanve dho tizaka kporo we?
english: Could he be pulling the drum?

balanda: Ni nokanve dho tikara kafa we?
english: Could he be turning the table?

balanda: Ne nokanve dho tikeye ti ndi we?
Danda nokanve dho tiwofo takoni we?
english: Could we be discussing the story?

balanda: Ni nokanve dho tikolo wiki we?
english: Could he be hugging the child?

balanda: Ni nokanve dho tivanda wiki we?
english: Could he be protecting the child?

balanda: Ni nokanve dho tidho gbi tiyi we?
english: Could he be being in the house?

balanda: Ne nokanve dho tima nde we?
english: Could I be doing the work?

balanda: Ne nokanve dho tiwala gbi Wau we?
english: Could I be living in Wau?

balanda: Ne nokanve dho tiduru ngo we?
Ni nokanve dho tidüŋü kpendii we?
Ne nokanve dho tiloro kananje we?
english: Could I be watching the animals?
